# Audio Summary

Deep work session on Verona Platform. Romeo and Juliet confirmed end-to-end integration with routing and translation passing all tests. Tybalt proposed competing mesh routing project at Capulet board. Nurse Angela helping protect collaboration time. Schema bridge showing sub-millisecond performance.
